goal: Create and test one deterministic AlphaForge alpha candidate
strategist_task: Create a new alpha factor in alphaforge/src/alphaforge/candidates/ called momentum_alpha.py that implements a simple 20-day momentum factor. The factor should: 1) Take a price series as input (list or numpy array). 2) Compute the 20-day return: (price[-1] - price[-21]) / price[-21]. 3) Return the computed value. Also create a test script in alphaforge/src/alphaforge/candidates/ called test_momentum_alpha.py that: 1) Generates a synthetic price series (e.g., random walk of 100 days). 2) Imports and calls the momentum_alpha function. 3) Prints the resulting factor value. 4) Prints a report with fields: train_start='2020-01-01', train_end='2020-12-31', test_start='2021-01-01', test_end='2021-12-31', n_combinations=1, metric='IC' with value 0.0 (placeholder). Run the test script and include the report fields in the final completion summary.
